title: TDD Consolidated Plan: Activation + Process Improvements
description: Embed TDD enforcement in /implement_plan, simplify tdd-qa skill, add mutation-guided test generation, add structured checkpoints + async Gemma review

stories.title: Embed TDD in implement_plan
stories.description: Add TDD enforcement section to implement_plan.md so that phases touching .ts/.tsx source files auto-activate TDD enforcement
acceptance_criteria: implement_plan.md has a 'TDD Enforcement' section after 'Implementation Philosophy'
Section instructs to activate TDD enforcement via tdd-state.ts for phases with .ts/.tsx changes
Section instructs to derive scenarios from phase success criteria
Section instructs to clear enforcement after scenarios complete
Section lists skip conditions: docs-only, config, workflow/markdown, no behavioral criteria
bun run test passes

stories.title: Simplify tdd-qa skill
stories.description: Remove dead Trace-Informed RED step 0.5 from tdd-cycle.md, demote Bombadil in SKILL.md routing
acceptance_criteria: tdd-cycle.md has no step 0.5 (Trace-Informed RED)
SKILL.md does not route to bombadil by default in Workflow Routing section
SKILL.md notes Bombadil as experimental, invoke explicitly
explore-bombadil.md still exists (not deleted)
bun run test passes

stories.title: Mutation-guided test generation (Bonus Round)
stories.description: Add step 8.5 to tdd-cycle.md for mutation bonus round after all planned scenarios, update mutation-check.md with integration reference
acceptance_criteria: tdd-cycle.md has step 8.5 (Mutation Bonus Round) between step 8 and step 9
Step 8.5 runs after all planned scenarios complete, not after each
Max 5 surviving mutants processed (bounded)
mutation-check.md references the tdd-cycle integration
bun run test passes

stories.title: Structured checkpoints + async Gemma review
stories.description: Add scenario boundary checkpoints (step 9.5) and post-loop async Gemma 4 review to tdd-cycle.md
acceptance_criteria: tdd-cycle.md has step 9.5 (Checkpoint) after step 9
Checkpoint uses existing working-memory.ts
tdd-cycle.md has post-loop Uncorrelated Review section after Deactivate TDD Enforcement
Gemma review uses existing ollama-client.ts
Both steps gracefully skip when prerequisites unavailable
bun run test passes
